questions.question: Explain the difference between linear regression and multiple linear regression. Provide an example to illustrate your explanation.

A company wants to predict the price of a house based on its area and number of bedrooms. They decide to use a multiple linear regression model with area and number of bedrooms as independent variables and price as the dependent variable. What type of regression model is this and why?
What is polynomial regression and when would you use it? Provide an example of when polynomial regression might be preferred over linear regression.
